RED_PAINT_ORB.title: Red Paint Orb
RED_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to all enemies.
BLUE_PAINT_ORB.title: Blue Paint Orb
BLUE_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Grants Block to self and team.
BLUE_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Give [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] to all allies.
YELLOW_PAINT_ORB.title: Yellow Paint Orb
YELLOW_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Generates Energy for self and allies.
YELLOW_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At start of turn, gain {Passive:energyIcons()}.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Give {Evoke:energyIcons()} to all allies.
ORANGE_PAINT_ORB.title: Orange Paint Orb
ORANGE_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, apply [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Apply [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies.
GREEN_PAINT_ORB.title: Green Paint Orb
GREEN_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, apply [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold] to a random enemy.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Apply [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold] to all enemies.
PURPLE_PAINT_ORB.title: Purple Paint Orb
PURPLE_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At end of turn, apply [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to a random enemy.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Apply [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to all enemies.
BLACK_PAINT_ORB.title: Black Paint Orb
BLACK_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Grants Majoka to self and allies.
BLACK_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At start of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Majoka[/gold].\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Give [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Majoka[/gold] to all allies.
WHITE_PAINT_ORB.title: White Paint Orb
WHITE_PAINT_ORB.description: Orb: Draws cards for you and allies.
WHITE_PAINT_ORB.smartDescription: [gold]Passive:[/gold] At start of turn, draw [blue]{Passive}[/blue] card.\n[gold]Evoke:[/gold] All allies draw [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] card.
